heading: Definitions
label: 460mmm–1 Definitions
notes: Effective Date of 2004 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 108–400section 1(g) of Pub. L. 108–400section 460mmm of this titleJan. 1, 2005
amendments: Effective Date of 2004 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 108–400section 1(g) of Pub. L. 108–400section 460mmm of this titleJan. 1, 2005

children.heading: Conservation Area
children.label: 1 Conservation Area
children.text: The term “Conservation Area” means the McInnis Canyons National Conservation Area established by .section 460mmm–2(a) of this title

children.heading: Council
children.label: 2 Council
children.text: The term “Council” means the McInnis Canyons National Conservation Area Advisory Council established under .section 460mmm–6 of this title

children.heading: Management plan
children.label: 3 Management plan
children.text: The term “management plan” means the management plan developed for the Conservation Area under .section 460mmm–4(h) of this title

children.heading: Map
children.label: 4 Map
children.text: The term “Map” means the map entitled “Proposed Colorado Canyons National Conservation Area and Black Ridge Canyons Wilderness Area” and dated .July 18, 2000

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior, acting through the Director of the Bureau of Land Management.

children.heading: Wilderness
children.label: 6 Wilderness
children.text: The term “Wilderness” means the Black Ridge Canyons Wilderness so designated in .section 460mmm–3 of this title
